'''âf-j-g''' ('''fajaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preacherize|preacherize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preacherize|preacherize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| fajaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajagithi|fajagithi]] || [[word:fajagiji|fajagiji]] || [[word:fajagishi|fajagishi]] || [[word:fajagi|fajagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajaguthuth|fajaguthuth]] || [[word:fajagujuj|fajagujuj]] || [[word:fajagushush|fajagushush]] || [[word:fajag|fajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajaguthu|fajaguthu]] || [[word:fajaguju|fajaguju]] || [[word:fajagushu|fajagushu]] || [[word:fajagu|fajagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajagufuth|fajagufuth]] || [[word:fajagufuj|fajagufuj]] || [[word:fajagufush|fajagufush]] || [[word:fajaguf|fajaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajagethe|fajagethe]] || [[word:fajageje|fajageje]] || [[word:fajageshe|fajageshe]] || [[word:fajage|fajage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajagothoth|fajagothoth]] || [[word:fajagojoj|fajagojoj]] || [[word:fajagoshosh|fajagoshosh]] || [[word:fajag|fajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajagotho|fajagotho]] || [[word:fajagojo|fajagojo]] || [[word:fajagosho|fajagosho]] || [[word:fajago|fajago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajagofoth|fajagofoth]] || [[word:fajagofoj|fajagofoj]] || [[word:fajagofosh|fajagofosh]] || [[word:fajagof|fajagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajagĂŠthĂŠ|fajagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fajagĂŠjĂŠ|fajagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fajagĂŠshĂŠ|fajagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fajagĂŠ|fajagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajagathath|fajagathath]] || [[word:fajagajaj|fajagajaj]] || [[word:fajagashash|fajagashash]] || [[word:fajag|fajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajagatha|fajagatha]] || [[word:fajagaja|fajagaja]] || [[word:fajagasha|fajagasha]] || [[word:fajaga|fajaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajagafath|fajagafath]] || [[word:fajagafaj|fajagafaj]] || [[word:fajagafash|fajagafash]] || [[word:fajagaf|fajagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fajagasha|fajagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofajagasha|gofajagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifajagasha|gokifajagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fajagnĂŒsha|fajagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofajagnknĂŒsha|gofajagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifajagnĂŒsha|gokifajagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fajagshĂ«sha|fajagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofajagnkshĂ«sha|gofajagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifajagshĂ«sha|gokifajagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajagrosha|fajagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajagnkrosha|gofajagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajagrosha|gokifajagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fajagmusha|fajagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajagnkmusha|gofajagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajagmusha|gokifajagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fajagsherasha|fajagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofajagnksherasha|gofajagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifajagsherasha|gokifajagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fajagngasha|fajagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofajagnkngasha|gofajagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifajagngasha|gokifajagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fajagyasha|fajagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofajagnkyasha|gofajagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifajagyasha|gokifajagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fajagyamasha|fajagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofajagnkyamasha|gofajagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifajagyamasha|gokifajagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fajagnĂŒshĂ«sha|fajagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofajagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofajagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifajagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifajagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajagnĂŒrosha|fajagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajagnknĂŒrosha|gofajagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajagnĂŒrosha|gokifajagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajagnĂŒmusha|fajagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajagnknĂŒmusha|gofajagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajagnĂŒmusha|gokifajagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fajagshĂ«nĂŒsha|fajagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofajagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofajagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifajagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifajagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajagshĂ«rosha|fajagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajagnkshĂ«rosha|gofajagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajagshĂ«rosha|gokifajagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajagshĂ«musha|fajagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajagnkshĂ«musha|gofajagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajagshĂ«musha|gokifajagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fajagronĂŒsha|fajagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofajagnkronĂŒsha|gofajagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifajagronĂŒsha|gokifajagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fajagroshĂ«sha|fajagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofajagnkroshĂ«sha|gofajagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifajagroshĂ«sha|gokifajagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajagromusha|fajagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajagnkromusha|gofajagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajagromusha|gokifajagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fajagmunĂŒsha|fajagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofajagnkmunĂŒsha|gofajagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifajagmunĂŒsha|gokifajagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fajagmushĂ«sha|fajagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofajagnkmushĂ«sha|gofajagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifajagmushĂ«sha|gokifajagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajagmurosha|fajagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajagnkmurosha|gofajagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajagmurosha|gokifajagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fajag|fajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠg|fĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofajag|hofajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠjĂŠg|hofĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofajag|hohofajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠjĂŠg|hohofĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfajag|nĂŒfajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠjĂŠg|nĂŒfĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfajag|nĂŒnĂŒfajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠjĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfajag|nĂŻfajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠjĂŠg|nĂŻfĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfajag|nĂŻnĂŻfajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠjĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufajag|lufajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠjĂŠg|lufĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufajag|lulufajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠjĂŠg|lulufĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifajag|lifajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠjĂŠg|lifĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifajag|lilifajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠjĂŠg|lilifĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofajag|kofajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠjĂŠg|kofĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofajag|kokofajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠjĂŠg|kokofĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefajag|kefajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠjĂŠg|kefĂŠjĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefajag|kekefajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠjĂŠg|kekefĂŠjĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
